text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at a shrine today after being invited by
Manhattan Cafe, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Um, is something bothering you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Cafe... No, it's nothing much...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well... there have been UFO sightings at
several locations I've visited.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I trained here at this shrine yesterday, so I
thought that perhaps a UFO would come by. I've
been here since morning, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I suppose they were just rumors after all.
It looks like I was worried over nothing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I should get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...There she goes. I sense something in the air...
But not an UFO, it's more like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before Manhattan Cafe can finish speaking, a
bright light envelops us!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Don't worry... They have no intention of harming us.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, that's right. I'm the only one who can hear
the voices...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She continues to talk with them for some time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
They were happy enough with what I told them...
So they let us go...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, they were just doing some research,
and... we suffered no harm. I actually feel better
now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't exactly understand what just happened...
but Manhattan Cafe looks perfectly fine.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... It would be nice if we could express our
gratitude in person someday...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next moment, the bright light fades to
nothing...

text_block_list.name: Cameraman A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, excuse me! Sorry, but could you step back a
little?

text_block_list.name: Cameraman A
text_block_list.text:
We're filming a TV show right now. Sorry about
the inconvenience!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the strange light was actually from a
camera all along...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
For a moment there I almost believed... but what
a disappointment.
